articles.summary: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli has added another pole position to his tally in Qualifying for the British Grand Prix.

articles.summary: It was a second victory of the season for Ugo Ugochukwu after a dominant Sprint Race win at Silverstone.

articles.summary: Liam Lawson was investigated after the Sprint at the British Grand Prix, and the stewards have now issued their verdict.

articles.title: Hamilton reflects on Silverstone Sprint battle with Antonelli
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton had to settle for second in Saturday's Sprint, despite starting the event on pole.

articles.title: Disappointed Russell assesses ‘not ideal’ Silverstone Sprint
articles.summary: George Russell took P4 in the Sprint at the British Grand Prix, gaining one position from where he started – but the Mercedes driver felt that more was possible.

articles.summary: After remaining in P2 across the opening laps of the Silverstone Sprint, Kimi Antonelli had to bide his time in his battle with Lewis Hamilton.

articles.title: Antonelli beats Hamilton to Silverstone Sprint win
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli has taken victory in a Sprint for the first time, the Mercedes driver winning the event at the British Grand Prix ahead of Lewis Hamilton and Lando Norris.
